headline: Guy's 'I Don't Read Instructions' Is Why His IKEA Bookshelf Now Doubles As Abstract Art
summary: The shelf leans 45 degrees. He calls it 'postmodern.' His wife calls it 'a hazard.' The cat loves it.
fullBody: Jake McIKEA refused to read the instructions. 'I have intuition,' Jake said. The bookshelf now has 3 legs, 2 extra shelves, and 'creative lean.' 'It's avant-garde,' Jake said. His wife has hired a professional. The professional couldn't fix it. 'It's art now,' the professional said. The cat has claimed the 'leaning shelf' as a perch. Jake is 'proud.' His wife is 'looking at apartments.' The shelf remains.
